calendar.matters:
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rodolfo Marquez appeared by zoom for Janis Lathrop (petitioner) in court.

The court noted that no other parties are present, that at the prior hearing Mr. Pappas came forward indicating that he is objecting, that he was given a timetable to file his objections, and that he has not done so. Counsel and Mrs. Lathrop described the property. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Continued To Mar-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom: Elliott Pappas (Decedent's Nephew) in propria persona.

Mr. Pappas stated that he was appearing to object and would like to get an attorney. At the request of the Court, Mr. Pappas addressed the nature of his objection stating that the property has been in his family for 100 years, that he is a bloodline heir, that his uncle passed away, that his aunt wants the property in her name so she can sell it, that his aunt brought in a 1997 will, and that the property came to his uncle at a later time.

At the conclusion of comments, the Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is continued to March 15, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Pappas is to file written objections by March 1, 2023. Any reply is to be on file by March 8, 2023.

The Court encouraged Mr. Pappas to find a lawyer to help, stated that the San Francisco Bar has a referral panel that could provide him with the names of probate attorneys, and noted that the SF Bar referral service could be reached at 415.989.1616.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
